blocklists.name: AdGuard Mobile Ads filter
blocklists.description: Filter that blocks ads on mobile devices. Contains all known mobile ad networks.

blocklists.name: EasyList
blocklists.description: EasyList is the primary filter list that removes most adverts from international webpages, including unwanted frames, images and objects. It is the most popular list used by many ad blockers and forms the basis of over a dozen combination and supplementary filter lists.

blocklists.name: Steven Black
blocklists.description: Extending and consolidating hosts files from several well-curated sources like adaway.org, mvps.org, malwaredomainlist.com, someonewhocares.org, and potentially others.

blocklists.name: OISD
blocklists.description: Internet's #1 domain blocklist. Blocks Ads, Mobile Ads, Phishing, Malvertising, Malware, Tracking, Telemetry, CryptoJacking, Analytics, Spyware, Ransomware, Exploit, Fraud, Abuse, Scam, Spam, Hijack, Misleading Marketing.

blocklists.name: notracking
blocklists.description: Automatically updated, moderated and optimized list for blocking ads, trackers and other online garbage.

blocklists.name: NSABlocklist
blocklists.description: Block all known NSA / GCHQ / C.I.A. / F.B.I. spying servers. Originally based on 2007 published Wikileaks documents and includes my own modifications from 2008, 2012, 2014 and 2015.

blocklists.name: AdAway
blocklists.description: Blocking mobile ad providers and some analytics providers.

blocklists.name: AdGuard Tracking Protection filter
blocklists.description: The most comprehensive list of various online counters and web analytics tools. If you do not want your actions on the Internet be tracked, use this filter.

blocklists.name: AdGuard Base filter
blocklists.description: Filter that enables removing of the ads from websites with English content.

blocklists.name: Fanboy's Annoyance List
blocklists.description: Fanboy's Annoyance List blocks Social Media content, in-page pop-ups and other annoyances; thereby substantially decreasing web page loading times and uncluttering them.

blocklists.name: WindowsSpyBlocker (Spy)
blocklists.description: Block spying and tracking on Windows systems.

blocklists.name: Anudeep's Blacklist for ads and trackers
blocklists.description: Curated and well-maintained hostfile to block ads, tracking, cryptomining, and more! Updated regularly.

blocklists.name: Lightswitch05 - Ads & Tracking
blocklists.description: A programmatically expanded list of hosts used for advertisements and tracking. This is my primary list and I recommend using it.

blocklists.name: Energized Ultimate
blocklists.description: Comprehensive, full protection.

blocklists.name: UncheckyAds
blocklists.description: Windows installers ads sources.

blocklists.name: BarbBlock
blocklists.description: Block sites which have used DMCA takedowns to force removal from other content blocking lists. Such takedowns are categorically invalid, but they can be effective at intimidating small open-source projects into compliance.

blocklists.name: Peter Lowe
blocklists.description: Blocklist for use with hosts files to block ads.

blocklists.name: someonewhocares.org (Dan Pollock)
blocklists.description: Protects you from many types of spyware, reduces bandwidth use, blocks certain pop-up traps, prevents user tracking by way of "web bugs" embedded in spam, provides partial protection to IE from certain web-based exploits and blocks most advertising you would otherwise be subjected to on the internet.

blocklists.name: AdGuard Social Media filter
blocklists.description: If you do not like numerous «Like» and «Tweet» buttons on all the popular websites on the Internet, subscribe to this filter, and you will not see them anymore.

blocklists.name: NoTrack Tracker Blocklist
blocklists.description: Contains one of the largest compilation of sites associated with tracking your online activities and invading your privacy.

blocklists.name: Fanboy's Enhanced Tracking List
blocklists.description: Fanboy's Enhanced Tracking List blocks common tracking scripts such as Omniture, Webtrends, Foresee, Coremetrics, Google-Analytics, Touchclarity, ChannelIntelligence.

blocklists.name: EasyList China
blocklists.description: EasyList China is an affiliated filter list written by John and Li that specifically removes adverts on Chinese language websites.

blocklists.name: Perflyst's Smart-TV Blocklist
blocklists.description: Block smart-TVs sending metadata back home, sometimes with the added benefit of blocking interface ads for apps and movie services.

blocklists.name: AdGuard Russian filter
blocklists.description: Filter that enables removing of the ads from websites in Russian.

blocklists.name: EasyList Germany
blocklists.description: EasyList Germany is a filter list written by the EasyList authors MonztA, Famlam and Khrin that specifically removes adverts on German language websites.

blocklists.name: RU AdList
blocklists.description: Russian supplement for EasyList.

blocklists.name: Liste FR
blocklists.description: Liste FR is an affiliated filter list written by Lian, Crits and smed79 that specifically removes adverts on French language websites.

blocklists.name: Personal Blocklist by WaLLy3K
blocklists.description: Content added to this list has been manually verified, and is updated irregularly.

blocklists.name: AdAway Blocking Hosts File for Japan
blocklists.description: AdAwayで使用可能な、日本環境用 広告除去用hostsを公開します。日本環境用に特化しています。

blocklists.name: EasyList Dutch
blocklists.description: EasyList Dutch is an affiliated filter list written by the EasyList author Famlam that specifically removes adverts on Dutch language websites.

blocklists.name: Lightswitch05 - Tracking Aggressive
blocklists.description: A very aggressive block list for tracking, geo-targeting, & ads. This list will likely break functionality, so do not use it unless you are willing to maintain your own whitelist.

blocklists.name: ABPindo
blocklists.description: ABPindo is an affiliated filter list written by hermawan that specifically removes adverts on Indonesian language websites.

blocklists.name: YousList
blocklists.description: Block filter for advertisements, mainly on Korean sites.

blocklists.name: EasyList Italy
blocklists.description: EasyList Italy is a filter list written by the EasyList author Khrin that specifically removes adverts on Italian language websites.

blocklists.description: EasyList Czech and Slovak is an affiliated filter list written by tomasko126 that specifically removes adverts on Czech and Slovak language websites.

blocklists.description: EasyList Lithuania is an affiliated filter list written by gymka that specifically removes adverts on Lithuanian language websites.

blocklists.name: Latvian List
blocklists.description: Latvian List is an affiliated filter list written by anonymous74100 that specifically removes adverts on Latvian language websites.

blocklists.name: 1Hosts (Lite)
blocklists.description: Safeguard your device(s) against pesky ads, trackers, and malware.

blocklists.name: EasyPrivacy
blocklists.description: EasyPrivacy is an optional supplementary filter list that completely removes all forms of tracking from the internet, including web bugs, tracking scripts and information collectors, thereby protecting your personal data.

blocklists.description: anti-AD是目前中文区命中率最高的广告过滤列表，实现了精确的广告屏蔽和隐私保护。

blocklists.name: AdGuard DNS filter
blocklists.description: A filter composed of several other filters (AdGuard Base filter, Social media filter, Tracking Protection filter, Mobile Ads filter, EasyList and EasyPrivacy) and simplified specifically to be better compatible with DNS-level ad blocking.
